mlx_server.title: Starting MLX-LM server
mlx_server.message: Local inference on Apple Silicon. Your data never leaves your machine.
mlx_server.details: MLX is Apple's native ML framework, optimized for unified memory architecture. Models run directly on the Neural Engine for maximum performance.

vllm_server.title: Starting vLLM container
vllm_server.details: vLLM provides high-throughput serving with PagedAttention for efficient memory management.

postgres.title: Starting PostgreSQL
postgres.message: Row-level security on every table. Audit trails built-in.
postgres.details: Every document access is controlled by PostgreSQL RLS policies. Complete audit trail for compliance.

milvus.title: Starting Milvus vector database
milvus.message: Enterprise vector search. Find documents by meaning, not keywords.
milvus.details: Milvus enables semantic search across millions of documents. Hybrid search combines vectors with keyword filtering.

redis_minio.title: Starting Redis & MinIO
redis_minio.message: Job queues and S3-compatible storage. All local, all secure.
redis_minio.details: Redis Streams for reliable job processing. MinIO for S3-compatible object storage without cloud dependencies.

authz.title: Starting AuthZ service
authz.message: OAuth2 + RBAC. Every request authenticated and authorized.
authz.details: JWT tokens with fine-grained scopes. Role-based access control with dynamic policy evaluation.

data.title: Starting Data API
data.message: Automatic PDF extraction, chunking, and semantic embedding.
data.details: Marker for high-quality PDF extraction. Smart chunking preserves document structure. FastEmbed for efficient vectorization.

search.title: Starting Search API
search.message: Hybrid search: vectors + keywords. Results filtered by permissions.
search.details: Combine semantic similarity with traditional search. Every result respects the user's access permissions.

worker.title: Starting Data Worker
worker.message: Background processing: PDF -> text -> chunks -> vectors
worker.details: Async document processing pipeline. Upload returns immediately, processing happens in background.

agent.title: Starting Agent API
agent.message: AI agents with tools. RAG search. Workflow automation.
agent.details: Agents can search documents, call APIs, and execute multi-step workflows with full audit trails.

frontends.title: Starting Busibox Portal & Agent Manager
frontends.message: Beautiful UI. SSO integration. White-label ready.
frontends.details: Modern React interfaces with dark mode, accessibility, and complete customization support.

seeding.title: Ingesting demo documents
seeding.message: Watch the pipeline: upload -> extract -> chunk -> embed -> search.
seeding.details: Sample documents demonstrate the full ingestion pipeline and enable immediate RAG demonstrations.

ready.title: Demo ready!
ready.message: Air-gap capable. Disconnect wifi and everything keeps working.
ready.details: All components run locally. No cloud dependencies for core operations. Complete data sovereignty.

value_props.data_sovereignty: Your documents, conversations, and embeddings never leave your infrastructure. No third-party APIs required for core operations.
value_props.predictable_costs: Local inference means flat costs as usage grows. Optional cloud burst for peak demand, controlled by policy.
value_props.ship_fast: Pre-built agents and workflows get you from zero to production in days. Customize with low-code tools or full code access.
value_props.enterprise_controls: Row-level access control on every document. Audit logs for compliance. Role-based permissions throughout.
value_props.air_gap: All components run locally with no external dependencies. Perfect for secure environments and compliance requirements.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Mac Studio M2 Ultra, Mac Pro

ultra.name: Ultra
ultra.description: Maxed Mac Studio Ultra, Mac Pro
